_comment: Assortments (service contexts) + module pricing config. testtafel draws on the centraal/Mediamatic stock pool — it is an assortment, not a stock location. Entries reference drink names from drinks-catalogue.json / drinks-recipes.json.

config.labourRateNote: €17.30/h from the wine form enums; older cocktail calculator used €0.27/min. Manager-editable.

markupTargets._note: REVERSE-ENGINEER at seed time: per category, compute median(price_exBTW / totalCost) over seeded drinks where both are known; fall back to default where cost unknown.

storageAreasPlaceholders.note: West areas are real and live in the catalogue items' storage fields / storage config; Mediamatic areas are placeholders for staff to rename.

assortments.name: West Bar
assortments.description: Full program at Sering West: tap + can beer, house wines, premix cocktails, classic mixed drinks, homemade non-alc, sodas, coffee & tea.

assortments.name: Sering Centraal
assortments.description: Centraal/Mediamatic range — beers + house wines + sodas, built from actual Tebi sales Mar–Jun 2026 (DSC products).
assortments.todo: Confirm pars + suppliers for the Centraal beers (Gulpener/2 Caps/Lowlander/Playground/Jever — likely Slurp Bier or HANOS); stock pool is shared with TestTafel.

assortments.name: TestTafel
assortments.description: Fine-dining pairing program: natural wines by glass/bottle + homemade non-alcoholic pairings. Draws on the Mediamatic stock pool (location centraal).
assortments.todo: Wine list rotates — seed the house wines + Ginja Ninja; head waiter curates the rest in-app (wine-form fields: producer, region, soil, grapes, profile, notes).
